ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_stats" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics collection */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the year for the reported data */,
  "percent_deaths" REAL /* Percentage of deaths due to pneumonia and influenza */,
  "expected_rate" REAL /* Expected mortality rate for the week */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for significant variations in mortality rate */,
  "all_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths recorded */,
  "pneumonia_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to pneumonia */,
  "influenza_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to influenza */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the mortality statistics */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Data quality score (1-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "week")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_num" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes for the week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expected_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected rate record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expected rate */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the expected rate */,
  "expected_rate" REAL /* Expected mortality rate for the week */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of expected rate (e.g., national average, regional average) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the expected rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expected_rates_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expected_rates_week FOREIGN KEY ("week") REFERENCES weeks ("week_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold record */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold for significant variations */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., national threshold, regional threshold) */,
  "trigger_action" TEXT /* Action to be taken when the threshold is exceeded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the death record */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the death record */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths recorded */,
  "pneumonia_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to pneumonia */,
  "influenza_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to influenza */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deceased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_week FOREIGN KEY ("week") REFERENCES weeks ("week_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Week of the year for the reported data
Percentage of deaths due to pneumonia and influenza
Expected mortality rate for the week
Threshold for significant variations in mortality rate

Number of deaths due to influenza
